overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting an orbital view of the planet Kadaku in a sci-fi setting. Derelict spacecraft drift past the planet's teal atmosphere before a massive space station descends into view from above.

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the planet from orbit

entered.detail: greenish planet with swirling cloud cover and bright atmospheric rim lighting
dense field of distant stars against the blackness of space

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide orbital view of the planet Kadaku, showing its curved horizon and teal-green atmosphere against the starfield. The camera remains stationary as the planet slowly rotates below.

events.description: derelict spacecraft and debris enter the frame from the left

agents.ego_description: observing the derelict vessels drifting past the planet's atmosphere

notable_agents.action: damaged cruiser with red hull plating tumbling end over end as it drifts across the view

entered.detail: large damaged spacecraft with dark red hull and exposed internal structure
scattered wreckage and smaller craft drifting in loose formation

segments.scene_description: Derelict spacecraft enter the frame from the left, drifting slowly past the planet's atmosphere. A large damaged cruiser tumbles prominently through the center of the view while smaller debris follows in its wake, all moving from left to right.

events.description: massive space station or hive ship descends into view from above the planetary horizon

agents.ego_description: observing the massive structure descending from above the planet

notable_agents.action: massive dark space station with multiple lights slowly descending from above

entered.detail: enormous dark rectangular structure with rows of illuminated windows descending from above

segments.scene_description: A massive space station descends into view from above the planet's horizon, its dark silhouette dotted with lights. The station dwarfs the earlier derelicts as it moves slowly downward, while the previous spacecraft fade into the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital perspective of the planet Kadaku that evolves from a serene planetary view into a scene of cosmic wreckage and massive industrial scale. It begins with a wide, stationary view of the planet's curved horizon and teal-green atmosphere rotating slowly against a dense starfield. As the camera holds its position, derelict spacecraft and a large damaged cruiser drift into the frame from the left, tumbling across the center of the view toward the right. The scene then shifts in scale as a massive space station descends from above the horizon, its dark, light-dotted silhouette dwarfing the drifting debris. Finally, the station dominates the foreground as the earlier derelict ships fade into the distance, completing the transition from a natural planetary vista to a landscape of sci-fi ruins.
